headline: Charles River Laboratories International (CRL) Expands Cell Therapy Work, Is The Stock Still Undervalued?
summary: Charles River Laboratories International (CRL) has drawn fresh investor attention after announcing a collaboration with Arovella Therapeutics to provide GMP Next Generation Sequencing services for ALA-101, an off the shelf CAR-iNKT cell therapy program. See our latest analysis for Charles River Laboratories International. The collaboration news comes as Charles River Laboratories International trades at US$229.16, with a 30 day share price return of 24.01% and a 1 year total shareholder...
